## Warning checklist

Do not merge until all applicable safety checks are confirmed:

- [ ] Do not merge if `app/admin/page.tsx` conflicts.
- [ ] Do not merge if `app/globals.css` conflicts.
- [ ] Do not merge if database/schema changes are unclear.
- [ ] Do not merge if healthcheck links fail.
- [ ] Do not merge if this PR replaces another PR but the old PR is still open without explanation.
